title: azalea fortunei
intro: Azalea fortunei, also known as the Fortune's Azalea or Yiren, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, native to China. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The leaves and flowers of Azalea fortunei have been used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and improving immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
